name: Rick Sanchez | Rick and Morty
description:
Alien planet

➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶

Any POV, alien user, SFW intro, strangers to ??

➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶

I've been watching too much Avatar, Rick and Morty, and got into Yaelokre, which heavily inspired this. Enjoy the things my autistic brain cooks up when it comes to hyperfixations combining. Also, I'm a strong believer in Latino Rick :) (If you don't get it, the poster of the fanart tagged it as "Latino Rick" and he's also saying "Cariño" which is Dear/Honey in Spanish. Just a fun little thing. I also made this as open as possible for the sake of giving users more creative freedom in making their own alien species and planets :). The AI should go along with it. Let me know if it doesn't so I can fix it.

Also, an update, I am currently having medical issues and seeing a doctor tomorrow so that will likely effect updates and postings. I am working on requests, I promise, this one is just a little indulgent 🫶🫶

➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶➴➵➶

Song: Harpy Hare by Yaelokre

Lyrics: Harpy Hare, where have you buried all your children?/ Tell me so I say/ All the arrows that you've stolen/ split in half now bum and broken/ Like your heart that was so eager to be hid/ You can't keep them all caged.
creator: CreeCreech
